_source: Live CMC x402 402-challenge captured 2026-06-13 + ONE real executed payment. Not from docs.

executed_payment.note: Wallet held 0 Base ETH; settlement still succeeded -> facilitator pays gas, EIP-3009 confirmed.

notes: x402 endpoint: https://mcp.coinmarketcap.com/x402/mcp (MCP streamable-HTTP; the REST host pro.coinmarketcap.com is behind an AWS WAF JS challenge and not callable headless).
x402 UNLOCKS get_global_crypto_derivatives_metrics (funding/OI) which the free REST tier blocks — relevant for a future strategy version.
There is NO fear-and-greed tool on x402; Fear & Greed remains free via the CMC v3 REST endpoint on all tiers.
